name: Ornn, Blacksmith
text: When you play me or when I hold, look at the top 4 cards of your Main Deck. You may reveal a gear from among them and draw it. Then recycle the rest.
text_rich: When you play me or when I hold, look at the top 4 cards of your Main Deck. You may reveal a gear from among them and draw it. Then recycle the rest.
accessibility_text: Riftbound Unit: Ornn, Blacksmith. When you play me or when I hold, look at the top 4 cards of your Main Deck. You may reveal a gear from among them and draw it. Then recycle the rest.

legality.notes: No specific Standard Constructed ban found in official first-bans announcement as of 2026-03-30.
